_about.purpose: Design specification for the Egg Rides ride-sharing coordination app. Designed to be pasted into Google Stitch (https://stitch.withgoogle.com/) or any other prompt-driven UI generator. Mirrors the live React app under /src so generated designs stay consistent with the codebase.
how_to_use: Option A (full app): Paste the entire JSON into Stitch's prompt box prefixed with `_suggested_intro` below. Ask for all five screens.
Option B (one screen at a time): Copy `_suggested_intro` + the single `screens[i]` block you want. Useful for iterating on one layout.
Option C (extract tokens only): Hand `design_tokens` to a designer/dev as the shared style spec.

_suggested_intro: Design the screens of a friendly, beginner-friendly web app called Egg Rides. It coordinates informal ride-shares (think: airport runs, group trips) without accounts or a backend — everything is local. Match the design tokens, layout, and copy in the JSON below exactly. Visual personality: an egg yolk in a soft leafy-green field — warm cream backgrounds, leafy-green primary actions, egg-yolk-yellow accents, generous rounded corners, soft shadows, restful whitespace. Target device: responsive web, optimised for mobile-first but readable on desktop. Avoid: heavy gradients, dark mode, complex iconography, marketing-style hero imagery.

meta.name: Egg Rides
meta.tagline: Share rides with people heading the same way, around the same time.
meta.description: A tiny ride-sharing coordination app. The user posts a ride (name, pickup, destination, date, time, notes). The app shows them matching groups and people before they commit, then they explicitly choose to request to join an existing group or post their own group. No login, no payments, no backend.
meta.primary_audience: Small social or work circles coordinating airport runs, conference trips, or weekend events.

tabs.container: flex row with 1px bottom border in `border`
tabs.tab: padding 10px 16px, weight 600, color text_dim, 2px transparent bottom border, margin-bottom -1px
tabs.active_tab: color text, bottom border 2px in accent

map_placeholder.description: Used when Google Maps is not configured OR when pickup/destination coords are not yet set.

no_api_key.title: Map preview disabled
no_api_key.body: Set VITE_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY in .env.local to enable Google Maps + Places autocomplete.

no_coords.title: Map preview
no_coords.body: Pick a pickup and destination from the suggestions to see them here.

map_live.description: Live Google Map when API key + coordinates are present.
map_live.behavior: auto-fit bounds when both markers present; otherwise center on the single marker at zoom 14

screens.title: Home — post a ride and browse existing groups
screens.purpose: Entry point. Either fill the form to find matches, or click an existing group to view its members.

blocks.subtitle: Share rides with people heading the same way, around the same time.

content.hint: We'll show you matching groups and individuals before you commit.

below.error_state: inline danger-colored message to the right

content.map_preview: Embed map_live OR map_placeholder between Destination and Date row

date_time_row.layout: two-column grid, two_col_gap, stacks on mobile

notes_field.label: Notes (optional)
notes_field.placeholder: Two suitcases, happy to split parking

content.error_state: Inline pill in danger color, e.g. 'Please fill in name, pickup, destination, date, and time.'

empty_state.body: Post one above — fill out your trip and we'll show you matching groups and people before you commit.

screens.title: Results — matching groups and people for the user's draft ride
screens.purpose: After the user submits the form, show what matches their trip and let them choose: join an existing group, message someone, invite someone, or post their own.
screens.entry: Clicking 'Find my group' on the home form (with valid input).

blocks.note: Discards draft but keeps form values.

blocks.empty_state: No matching groups yet. Post your ride below and others heading the same way can request to join.
No one else is heading toward "{destination}" yet. Post your ride to be the first.

button.text: Post my ride as a new group

screens.title: Group Detail — members, pending join requests, manage
screens.entry: Click any group card on the home page.

blocks.empty_state: No confirmed members yet — approve a pending request below to start the group.

list_item.container: padding 12px, background background, border 1px border, radius 10px, margin-bottom 8px
list_item.layout: horizontal flex with space-between (stacks vertically on mobile)

button.title_attr: Remove this person from the group

screens.title: Message Modal — mock chat with a person or a group
screens.trigger: Click 'Message' or 'Message group' or 'Invite to group' on a Results card

backdrop.behavior: centered modal; click outside or Escape key dismisses; fade-in 0.12s

sections.name: thread
sections.empty_state: No messages yet. This is a mock chat — your messages save locally on this device.  (centered, text_dim, 40px top margin)
sections.note: In current mock, only 'mine' bubbles will appear (since the recipient never replies).

sections.name: compose
sections.layout: horizontal flex, align-items flex-end, gap 8px (stacks on mobile)

textarea.placeholder: Type a message…  (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)

interactions.submit_form: Validate required fields → enter Results view with current form values as 'draft' (not yet committed).
interactions.back_to_form: Discard draft, keep typed form values, return to Home.
interactions.request_to_join_group: Commit draft as pending member of selected group, return to Home with success flash.
interactions.post_my_ride_as_new_group: Commit draft as confirmed member of a new group of one, return to Home with success flash.
interactions.message_person: Open MessageModal targeted at the person card; draft user is sender.
interactions.message_group: Open MessageModal targeted at the group card; draft user is sender.
interactions.invite_to_group: Open MessageModal with prefilled text: "Hey {name}, I'm heading to {destination} from {pickup} around {time}. Want to share a ride?"
interactions.approve_pending_member: Flip the pending ride's status to confirmed.
interactions.decline_pending_member: Remove the ride from store entirely.
interactions.remove_member: Remove the ride from store entirely.
interactions.use_my_current_location: Browser Geolocation API → reverse-geocode via Google Geocoding API → fill pickup label and capture lat/lng.
interactions.places_autocomplete: Google Places Autocomplete → on suggestion pick, fill input text and capture lat/lng.  Typing manually clears stored coords.

flashes.purpose: Brief, dismissible info banner at the top of the page after key actions.
examples: Posted! You're the first in your group — others can request to join.
Join request sent. When someone in the {pickup} → {destination} group approves, you're in.

footer.text: Data lives in this browser only. Clearing site data will erase all rides and messages.

mobile_changes: Result card action buttons stack vertically and fill full width.
Group detail list items stack name and action buttons vertically.
Modal compose row stacks textarea above a full-width send button.
All cards expand to fill horizontal padding.
